content: You appear to be stuck on [You are in Saclateni. Navigate to any asteroid belt or mining location in the system. Mine darksteel_ore and any other valuable ore. Fill cargo as much as possible (you have 171 free cargo slots). Keep mining until cargo is above 80% full or no more minable resources. Do NOT leave the system.] in phase active for 15 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
